title: Cyber-Physical Systems Security & Semantics
summary: Semantics-driven hardening of legacy and modern CPS; symbolic recovery of logic; testbed-based security experimentation.

title: Digital Twins & Formal Verification
summary: Formal and hybrid systems verification; fidelity-aware digital twins; verification-driven testbed design.

title: IoT & Sensor Privacy
summary: Privacy-preserving sensing and information flow for trustworthy ubiquitous systems, from edge to cloud.

title: Brain-Centered CPS / NeuroIoT
summary: Human-in-the-loop CPS with neural & environmental sensing; multimodal fusion and memory-centric modeling.

title: Digital Twinning for Industrial Control Systems
summary: This theme develops fidelity-aware digital twins that bridge engineered control code, physical process models, and experimental testbeds. Our work spans formal verification, real-system validation, and runtime conformance checking. We also leverage agentic testing frameworks for CPS that allow autonomous evaluation of system resilience, enabling verification and mitigation synthesis across realistic testbeds. Together, these efforts establish a principled foundation for trustworthy experimentation and security in cyber-physical infrastructure.
